NOTE :

if you dont know what is Nebulamancers? well its a fandom back in the (2011) 2015-2021 about Planet, Ghost, Asteroid, Birdie, Eartling and Demon it suppose to coming out as a series called Solar Emissary made by Pyohato and had different branch of timeline ending and also other Project but... apparently Pyo artstyle looked so similar to Funamusea (Okegom Fandom) someone assumed that Pyo trace Funamusea art so Some group are harrasing him (yes Pyo is male) from 2015! to 2021 and at July 7, 2021 Pyo made his last statement to leave the internet and saying sorry if his art somehow insulting or harmed people that seen it
